problem_statement: MAF runtime binding readiness needs a static deterministic fixture parity witness after the subprocess effect boundary before any executable Python-to-Rust binding path can be reconsidered.
success_criteria: MafDeterministicFixtureParityWitness validates against a public JSON schema and Foundation Mode example

MafDeterministicFixtureParityWitness binds the MAF subprocess effect boundary, MAF CLI scaffold, receipt schemas, deterministic fixture descriptors, UAO refs, LifeMeaningJudgment refs, and receipt refs
MafDeterministicFixtureParityWitness records deterministic fixture parity as closed while keeping solver outcome AwaitingEvidence

MafDeterministicFixtureParityWitness blocks CLI execution, subprocess execution, shell invocation, child process spawn, PyO3 binding, Rust crate execution, Python Rust imports, external connector calls, network calls, secret access, raw fixture payload retention, filesystem writes, runtime dispatch, canonical state mutation, terminal closure, and success claims

MafDeterministicFixtureParityWitness rejects authority drift, parity scope drift, future witness drift, fixture descriptor drift, digest drift, secret markers, receipt ref drift, and summary count drift
constraints: runtime_binding_claimed, subprocess_execution_claimed, cli_execution_claimed, and command_behavior_claimed remain false
each source artifact digest must match repository-local source files
each fixture descriptor digest must match the canonical command, input contract, output contract, and fixture material ref tuple
